slice: Fixed the in-Workspace overflow menu's 'Duplicate World' action, reachable from inside an already-open Official World (read-only View Mode) -- it called ProjectStore.duplicate() directly and never regenerated the copy's manifest id the way the Welcome-screen card's own Duplicate button already did, so the resulting copy silently reopened in View Mode too, reading as "Duplicate doesn't work." Fixed by extracting the id-regeneration logic into one shared _duplicateProject() helper used by both call sites. Verified via Playwright: both the Welcome-card button and the in-Workspace overflow-menu action now produce a Project with a fresh, distinct manifest id. goldenBuild.js's full 30-assertion suite passes unchanged.
